title: think-wrong output
description: Structured output from Think Wrong: a counterintuitive position that escapes consensus.

convergence_point.description: The consensus answer every other model/professional would give (one sentence)

position.description: The counterintuitive argument as continuous prose (no lists, no headers)

expert_pushback.description: What a credentialed expert would find threatening about this position

transfer_domain.description: The unrelated domain routed through for the domain transfer

banned_vocabulary.description: Domain-specific words that were banned during generation
